ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, autoencoder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training data belongs to */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the training data */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the training data */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the training data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the training data (e.g., image, text) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the training data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_results" (
  "training_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training result belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Validation loss */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Training time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "testing_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the testing result belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Testing loss */,
  "test_recon" REAL /* Reconstruction error */,
  "test_kld" REAL /* Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD) */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_snapshots" (
  "model_snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model snapshot */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the snapshot belongs to */,
  "snapshot_name" TEXT /* Name of the snapshot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the snapshot */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date when the snapshot was created */,
  "model_state" TEXT /* State of the model at the time of snapshot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_snapshots_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, graduate student) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "project_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., PI, collaborator) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the researcher to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being commented on */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "quality_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., mean, standard deviation) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_update_history" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_update_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_update_history" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_update_history_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id")
)
